channel.title: TrendFoundry Creator Intelligence
channel.description: Source-backed AI and developer creator opportunities with hooks, demo angles, and limitations.

item.title: #1 NousResearch/hermes-agent
item.description:
The agent that grows with you
Creator hook: 这期不讲概念，直接验证 NousResearch/hermes-agent 是否能进入真实创作工作流。
Demo angle: Reproduce the smallest useful workflow or summarize the core claim with evidence.
Limitation: Stars and recent activity can overstate production readiness; test install friction and maintenance quality.
Order the current pack: https://github.com/BraveCowNoFear/trendfoundry/issues/new?template=order-sample-pack.yml&title=Sample%20pack%20request%3A%20

item.title: #2 infiniflow/ragflow
item.description:
RAGFlow is a leading open-source Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) engine that fuses cutting-edge RAG with Agent capabilities to create a superior context layer for LLMs

item.title: #5 【2026最全面秋叶ComfyUI教程】B站强推！建议所有想学 AI 视频生成ComfyUI 工作流 的同学，死磕这条视频，花了一周时间整理的ComfyUI视频生成教程
item.description:
一个冷知识:点赞是免费的! 但是可以让辛苦做视频的UP主开心快乐一整天!!! 视频配套的整 合 包 &工 作 流资料，官注+平论掉落~

Limitation: Platform popularity is not proof of quality; validate the workflow before recommending it.
Order the current pack: https://github.com/BraveCowNoFear/trendfoundry/issues/new?template=order-sample-pack.yml&title=Sample%20pack%20request%3A%20

item.title: #7 From Zero to Your First AI Agent in 25 Minutes (No Coding)
item.description:
Futurepedia and AI Agent Lab / 1y ago / 3,781,213 views
Creator hook: 这期不讲概念，直接验证 From Zero to Your First AI Agent in 25 Minutes (No Coding) 是否能进入真实创作工作流。
Demo angle: Reproduce the smallest useful workflow or summarize the core claim with evidence.
Limitation: Platform popularity is not proof of quality; validate the workflow before recommending it.
Order the current pack: https://github.com/BraveCowNoFear/trendfoundry/issues/new?template=order-sample-pack.yml&title=Sample%20pack%20request%3A%20

item.title: #8 我睡觉的时候， AI 还在给我打工！实测爆火开源项目 gnhf：白天干自己的事，晚上让 Claude Code/Codex 自动迭代开发，醒来直接收成果！
item.description:
最近发现了一个让我非常兴奋的开源项目：gnhf（good night, have fun）。 它最吸引我的地方在于一个非常简单但又极具想象力的理念：白天由人工作，晚上由 AI 工作。 以前使用 Claude Code、Codex 或其他 AI Coding Agent 的时候，我们通常是坐在电脑前不断交互，AI停下来，我们继续输入指令。而 gnhf 的思路完全不同，它把 AI Agent 变成了一个可以长期运行的自动执行系统。你只需要在睡觉前给它设定一个明确目标，它就会在后台持续迭代工作，每完成一步就自动
Creator hook: 这期不讲概念，直接验证 我睡觉的时候， AI 还在给我打工！实测爆火开源项目 gnhf：白天干自己的事，晚上让 Claude Code/Codex 自动迭代开发，醒来直接收成果！ 是否能进入真实创作工作流。
Demo angle: Reproduce the smallest useful workflow or summarize the core claim with evidence.
Limitation: Platform popularity is not proof of quality; validate the workflow before recommending it.
Order the current pack: https://github.com/BraveCowNoFear/trendfoundry/issues/new?template=order-sample-pack.yml&title=Sample%20pack%20request%3A%20

item.title: #12 HANDOFF: Humanoid Agentic Task-Space Whole-Body Control via Distilled Complementary Teachers
item.description:
For a humanoid robot to be deployed in the real world, the choice of command space (i.e., the interface between task planning and whole-body control) is crucial. Existing whole-body controllers typically demand dense kinematic or spatial references that planners struggle to synthesize from task semantics. We instead propose a compact, explicit interface that
Creator hook: 这期不讲概念，直接验证 HANDOFF: Humanoid Agentic Task-Space Whole-Body Control via Distilled Complementary Teachers 是否能进入真实创作工作流。
Demo angle: Reproduce the smallest useful workflow or summarize the core claim with evidence.
Limitation: Research papers may be too early for mainstream creators; translate into a practical demo or skip.
Order the current pack: https://github.com/BraveCowNoFear/trendfoundry/issues/new?template=order-sample-pack.yml&title=Sample%20pack%20request%3A%20
